subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Tree doth remember one of its leaves, and remembereth it as a grace from God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الشجره تذکر ورقه من اوراقها و تذکرها فضلا من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @praise and encouragement, @station of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @thankfulness; gratitude
